name: Mobile-first UI redesign — Design System & Implementation Rules
scope: Define global design tokens (colors, radius, shadow, typography, spacing, animation)
Document layout architecture (mobile header, bottom tab, desktop sidebar, main content)
Create implementation rules for page building (component usage, styling, responsive, accessibility)
Provide anti-patterns and checklist for daily development
notes: Phase 8 (Auth Pages) completed on 2026-05-11. Verified liquid glass design integrity across sign-in, sign-up, public-layout, auth-panel, and auth-field. Identified that a subsequent cleanup commit (3acc15d) accidentally reverted the global Input component's liquid glass styles (border-white/20, bg-background/50, dark:border-white/10, dark:bg-white/5, focus glow). Restored liquid glass styling to all 5 auth inputs via explicit className overrides without refactoring the pages. Added subtle mobile refinement: sign-up footer now uses flex layout with flex-wrap (matching sign-in) for better text/link wrapping on narrow screens. Phase 9 (Landing Page) completed on 2026-05-11. Reviewed and refined mobile spacing, replaced hardcoded text-blue-950 with semantic tokens (bg-primary-foreground text-primary) for dark mode contrast compliance, reduced excessive mobile gaps in How It Works (gap-16→gap-10 md:gap-12) and Social Proof (gap-12→gap-8 md:gap-24), tightened card padding on mobile (p-8→p-6 md:p-8), and added subtle hover effects to testimonial cards for tactile consistency with other app pages. Build blocked by pre-existing calendar.tsx type error (unrelated).
